mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO test_order (order_no, user_id, amount, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.amount}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM test_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_order SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no IN
#{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM test_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM test_order WHERE status = 0 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY created_at ASC
